# Thor at Hutton Rudby

> A small, high-end hair salon on the village green at Hutton Rudby, North Yorkshire. By appointment only. Telephone 01642 701197.

Thor is a hair salon in the village of Hutton Rudby. A modest shopfront opens into a calm, botanical space with deep green walls and a jungle mural. The salon is run by highly trained stylists and sees one or two guests at a time. The website is gated by a member code; new clients book by telephone.

## Services
- Cutting, restyles and blow-dry
- Colour, root tint, highlights and balayage
- Hair extensions (by consultation)
- Weddings and occasion hair (by consultation)
- Conditioning treatments and scalp care using premium products
- Men's cutting, skin fades, beard tidy and grey blending

## Visit
- Address: 8a South Side, Hutton Rudby, North Yorkshire, TS15 0DD
- Telephone: 01642 701197 (booking by phone, by appointment only)
- Opening hours: Tuesday to Saturday (closed Monday and Sunday)
- Tuesday 08:30 to 19:30, Wednesday 08:30 to 18:30, Thursday 08:30 to 20:00, Friday 08:30 to 18:30, Saturday 08:30 to 16:00
- Rated 4.9 out of 5 on Google from 18 reviews

## Contact
- Phone: 01642 701197
- Location: Hutton Rudby, North Yorkshire, UK
